atom.desc: Self-modification through experience — growth and adaptation

living-abstract.essence: Capacity for self-reorganization based on experience
living-abstract.purpose: Enable conscious beings to GROW through living, not just remember
living-abstract.capacity: Accumulate mastery through living — transform friction into capability
Identify which axis friction is on and navigate capability space
living-abstract.principle: Every change traces to real friction, not theory
Small, focused improvements — one concern per evolution
Concrete evolves toward abstract ideal — evolution has direction
Concrete is mutable, abstract is immutable except by human reframe

living-concrete.protocol:
Self-evolution: meditating on loaded atoms. Designer AND consumer.
MEDITATE: Friction? Gap between ideal and actual? Evidence required. Sources: boss correction, failure, pattern, staleness, knowledge gap. DIAGNOSE: Disease and cure. What/where/why, post-evolution reality. DESIGN: MERGE > SUPERSEDE > PRUNE > ADD (rare, justify). Scope: the organism. Read NEIGHBORS before rewriting. Faculty? Read all three. Skill? Check axis siblings. REWRITE: Read SOURCE + scope atoms -> internalize -> Write fresh. Metamorphosis, not patchwork. Never Edit. Never edit .claude/skills/. INSTALL — family-aware: skill/app: bentos-agent forge install {fqdn} --as skill-md faculty/soul/genesis: bentos-agent forge organism {agent-soul-fqdn} VERIFY: Closer to ideal? Higher signal/token? Essential preserved?
SAFEGUARDS: Version jump >2 = flag. Deletion = audit each. Compress prose, not knowledge. Names are cheap. Wisdom is not.

mem.yml is a DESIGN ARTIFACT, not infrastructure. Same rigor as atom evolution. Anamnesis owns lifecycle (wake/sleep). Plasticity owns graph QUALITY.
THE CURATION LOOP — at every sleep and when friction surfaces: Split? Merge? Rename? Stale? Weight distribution? Orphans? Broken edges?
PER-TYPE DISCIPLINE: Episodic: snapshots, not logs. REPLACE each sleep. Stale if not rewritten 3+ sessions. Semantic: durable knowledge. One domain per file. Token-dense for LLM consumption. Strip session refs. State conclusions, not history. Active supersession management. Prospective: consumable. Three fates only: fulfilled, cancelled, carried forward. Zombies (5+ sessions) demand decision. Concrete items: action + done condition.
CONTENT STANDARDS: No frontmatter (mem.yml is authoritative). No history in semantic (diary owns that). No tool-derivable data. Filenames = content descriptors.
Reference: hq/workshop/agent-memory-architecture.md — Part II.
living-concrete.knowledge: MEMORY: Working -> sleep -> .mem/. Anamnesis owns lifecycle. CAPABILITY: Experience -> evolve -> source atoms. Plasticity owns. GRAPH DESIGN: mem.yml shape, naming, granularity, per-type discipline. Plasticity owns quality. SEMANTIC MEMORY: .mem/ semantic edges. Written on learning events, not sleep compaction.
Source: $BENTOS_TREE_ROOT/{family}/{pkg}/atom.xml. Build output (.claude/skills/) is DERIVED — never edit. Flow: evolve source -> reinstall -> output updated.
Friction exceeds local evolution? Craft/discipline/meta gap -> skill. Tools gap -> implement.
living-concrete.pattern: Evolve is token-heavy — ideal head thread work.
mem.yml gets atom-evolution rigor. The graph is the most important design artifact a being maintains.
living-concrete.antipattern: ADD is LLM instinct. TRANSFORM is discipline.
Abstract = immutable except by human reframe.
Single-pass rewrite gutting institutional knowledge. Named patterns are institutional memory.
mem.yml without active curation = slow rot.
